name: Lyly
description: '''Nguyễn Hoàng Lan{{efn|Most current sources, including her personal Facebook profile, refer to her original name as "Nguyễn Hoàng Ly."<ref name="birth name">{{Cite web|url=https://doisongphapluat.nguoiduatin.vn/sao-nu-vbiz-bat-ngo-tiet-lo-ten-that-hoa-ra-tu-hoi-ban-den-ca-wiki-deu-nham-lan-a467681.html|title=Sao nữ Vbiz bất ngờ tiết lộ tên thật, hóa ra từ hội bạn đến cả Wiki đều nhầm lẫn!|date=September 26, 2024}}</ref>|name="birthname"}}''' (born January 1, 1996),{{Citation needed|date=February 2026}} better known by her stage name '''Lyly''' (stylized as '''LyLy'''), is a Vietnamese actress, singer and songwriter. She first gained widespread recognition with her song "24h" (2018).
